briefs.title: BC Mental Health Regulation Form 10 replaced — updated official form now in effect
briefs.summary: BC updated Form 10 under the Mental Health Regulation, replacing the old version with a new one. Form 10 is an official government form used in the mental health system, and this change means any business or provider using the old form must switch to the new version.
briefs.action_required: Replace any copies of old Form 10 with the new version from the BC government website.
